root_orchestration.decision_notes: The problem asks for a binary conclusion regarding whether a Hermitian matrix spectrum can match the Riemann zeta zeros' super-rigidity, specifically identifying the gap between the zeta zeros' value and the standard GUE (Gaussian Unitary Ensemble) value.
